description: Random Category custom List for the Quest Waypoints Event Crafter Situation. Roll when Event Elements directs you to this List. The Challenge is what your PC will face in this Waypoint Scene. From Mythic Magazine #62.

descriptionTranslations.en: Random Category custom List for the Quest Waypoints Event Crafter Situation. Roll when Event Elements directs you to this List. The Challenge is what your PC will face in this Waypoint Scene. From Mythic Magazine #62.

entries.description: The challenge involves earning the trust of a key character through actions, diplomacy, or proving yourself.

entries.description: The challenge is intellectual: a puzzle, cipher, mystery, or problem that must be figured out.

entries.description: A trap, ambush, or dangerous situation that must be survived or overcome.
